/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -ffast-math CMakeFiles/test_distributed_write.dir/tests/test_distributed_write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_distributed_write.dir/generated_proto/query_service.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/test_distributed_write.dir/generated_proto/query_service.grpc.pb.cc.o -o test_distributed_write  -lgRPC::grpc++ /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so
